sourceRefs.fallbackText: Arguments read from a file must be one per line by default (but see also convert_arg_line_to_args() ) and are treated as if they were in the same place as the original file referencing argument on the command line. So in the example above, the expression ['-f', 'foo', '@args.txt'] is considered equivalent to the expression ['-f', 'foo', '-f', 'bar'] .
